description_long: This stereo sound system features a tall, rectangular column design with a sleek, modern aesthetic. The main body is encased in a gradient-colored shell that transitions from blue at the base to purple at the top, with large black mesh grilles covering the majority of its vertical faces for optimal sound projection. A prominent circular volume knob is located on one side, while a control panel with buttons and ports is situated near the base on another face. The object appears to be constructed primarily from metal and plastic, with the mesh grille likely made of perforated metal for durability and acoustic transparency. The overall finish is smooth and slightly glossy, giving it a contemporary look suitable for urban environments. Subtle branding and labeling are visible near the controls, enhancing its professional appearance.
description: A tall, rectangular stereo sound system with gradient blue-to-purple casing, black mesh grilles, a circular volume knob, and a control panel with buttons and ports.
description_view_0: This view shows the control panel with buttons and ports at the base, as well as the mesh grille covering the front face.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the large mesh grille and the protruding circular volume knob on the right side.
description_view_2: The front view centers on the mesh grille and the prominent circular volume knob below it, with 'Volume' text visible.
description_view_3: This angled view displays both the mesh grille and the control panel with buttons and ports, as well as the side-mounted volume knob.
attribute_brand_logo: The word 'Volume' is visible below the knob on the front face; no distinct brand logo is present.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grille features a fine, uniform mesh pattern with small, evenly spaced perforations, covering most of the vertical faces.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located near the base of one face and includes several small buttons and ports, with a large circular volume knob on the adjacent side. Some labeling is present near the controls.
